description: Services must not use raw SQL (use repositories)
fix: Use repository methods for all database operations. Services should not contain raw SQL.

description: Repositories must not import from services
fix: Repositories are below services in the layer hierarchy. Remove the upward dependency.

description: Models must not import from services or repositories
fix: Models are the bottom layer. They must not depend on services or repositories.

description: Event consumers must not import from API layer
fix: Event consumers should use services, not API layer code.

description: Tasks must not import from API layer
fix: Background tasks should use services, not API layer code.
